# 新闻速递 2026-03-17

## AppLovin
- Kinetic Partners Management LP增持AppLovin股票，或表明其看好公司未来发展。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- MIRAE ASSET GLOBAL ETFS HOLDINGS Ltd.持有AppLovin逾2.75亿美元仓位，显示机构对其价值的认可。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MIRAE ASSET GLOBAL ETFS HOLDINGS Ltd.减持MercadoLibre股票，或引发市场对其未来表现的担忧。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre股价涨势被指基础不稳，或暗示未来面临回调风险。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQbFdOWHhaQk5fQVJUdXFGS05rd3ZzOF9NeEd0aU1ISTB4NjhxRTg1TlB2WTAzbUxjQnNjTmN4RWQ0WlU2VEVSS19Qa09FNEd4RjRsZHhVWWhheGU4cUk3Nlp2UFkwTVNJVWt5R0ZnbVpLQlRXTEdNN1dKdzg5SHJ0THNEdGFZNnNXaGxVZFdHeEh2dExVYlk1SVYxeFcwS2JMNU5CWHZQbHpXVm1VZ1NzdQ?oc=5)）

## Coupang
- 美银证券维持Coupang“买入”评级和28美元目标价，或提振投资者信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPYmU0UVJtNmZVanBFNHlwQXNvM2ozTzNFbVZ6SUdybkE0YmFCY092V2dhOE9sVDRuVlRBc0dHalRRRVhxcTRxNG53Vnc3Wi1Vdmx3TmsweXRhSmhrR0VuWmo3QzRzUlJuWkZ6SW1UaWpMZXMzTml4dmtjNEczLUZVd2ZrY2t5bVdrejBLdFFIcWR0RGdpNERnOEZHcldCbWh3WnNZVkh3RUotUlhJWkVwMUt2UUg?oc=5)）
- Coupang股价显著飙升，市场或将关注其背后驱动因素及持续性。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
